name: yalla
description: Proof-first autonomous coding pipeline with minimum-diff discipline, binary review, and PR-only shipping.

interface.longDescription: Plan, build, test, review, and open PRs only when the user-visible promise is proven by deterministic evidence where possible.
defaultPrompt: Use Yalla to build this as a tested PR.
Review this diff with Yalla binary checks.
Find the minimum safe diff for this change.
